news.headline: Blues hit with injury blow in pulsating Magpies grudge match, Eagles host Lions
news.body: Bitter rivals Carlton and Collingwood meet with both sides in a good spot, while West Coast will be looking to spring an upset as the Eagles welcome Brisbane to Perth Stadium. Follow live.
